title: Ultraviolet light-emitting module and disinfecting system
abstract: Modules, systems and methods that disinfect surfaces using ultraviolet (UV) light are disclosed. In one aspect, a UV light-emitting module comprises an enclosure including a rear wall and a face plate that includes a light-transmitting aperture. At least one sidewall extends between the rear wall and the face plate, and at least one UV light emitter is located within the enclosure. The module includes at least one cooling feature selected from (1) a sidewall ventilation opening in the at least one sidewall and (2) a heat sink feature extending from the rear wall.
claims: 1. An ultraviolet (UV) light-emitting module for disinfecting one or more components, the UV light-emitting module comprising: an enclosure comprising: a rear wall; a face plate comprising an outer wall of the enclosure, the face plate spaced from the rear wall and comprising a light-transmitting aperture; and at least one sidewall extending between the rear wall and the face plate; at least one UV light emitter within the enclosure; at least one cooling feature selected from (1) a sidewall ventilation opening in the at least one sidewall and (2) a heat sink feature extending from the rear wall; at least one UV light emitter support within the enclosure that is electrically coupled to the at least one UV light emitter; an electrical conductor extending through the rear wall into the at least one UV light emitter support; and a thermally conductive and electrically insulating separator between the at least one UV light emitter support and the rear wall, wherein the at least one UV light emitter support is affixed to the thermally conductive and electrically insulating separator.
